# Rent Control Ghana

> Ghana's official digital platform for rent regulation, tenancy agreements, and dispute resolution under the Rent Act, 1963 (Act 220). Operated by the Rent Control Department to protect tenants and empower landlords.

The platform allows tenants and landlords to register, declare tenancies, file complaints, manage rent payments, and access fair-rent guidance. Rent Control Department staff use the same platform to mediate disputes, schedule hearings, and enforce Act 220 nationally.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform, role-based entry points, office locator, and information about Ghana's rent regulation framework.
- [Sign In](/login): Tenant, landlord, and student sign-in.
- [Register as a Tenant](/register/tenant): Create a tenant account and receive a unique Tenant ID.
- [Register as a Landlord](/register/landlord): Register as a landlord, list properties, and stay compliant with Act 220.
- [Staff Login](/regulator/login): Rent Control Department staff and NUGS administrators sign-in.
- [Reset Password](/forgot-password): Phone-based password recovery via OTP.

## Optional

- [Tenancy Verification](/verify-tenancy/): Public QR verification endpoint for registered tenancies.
- [Receipt Verification](/verify/receipt/): Public lookup for issued payment receipts.
- [Rent Card Verification](/verify/rent-card/): Public lookup for issued rent cards.
